attribution_message: This application was built with care using modern frameworks and tools. We are grateful to the open source community and all contributors for providing the resources that made this project possible.
brief_life_compass_instruction_1: The Life Compass typically contains ten areas that are important for most people. In each box, write a few words about what you value or consider important in that specific area. Each area also includes two ratings. In the upper box, indicate how important each area is in your life on a scale of 1 to 10, where 1 is not important and 10 is very important. Imagine how your life would be if everything looked exactly as you wished.
brief_life_compass_instruction_2: In the lower box, indicate how much you have lived in accordance with your values during the past week, where 1 means you haven't lived by your values at all and 10 means you have fully lived by your values. Then examine the differences between the numbers. Can you identify areas that are important to you but where you do not live as you would like? Consider what might be holding you back!
delete_local_data_warning: Warning: This will delete all data. All life areas will be removed.
description_help: Description of the life area. Can be used as support to fill in the details.
details_help: Here you write a few words about what you value or consider important in the life area.

goals.dialog_description: Set goals for this life area and break them into action steps.
goals.add_goal_placeholder: What do you want to achieve?
goals.empty_state: No goals yet. Add your first goal to start turning this area into action.
goals.delete_goal_warning: This will delete the goal "{{title}}" and all its steps. Do you want to continue?

practices.heading: Practices
practices.intro: A small, calm library. Open something when you feel ready -- there is nothing to finish here.

page.title: Everything, in plain words
page.subtitle: How Life Compass works and where it comes from. Read what you need and leave the rest - there's no order to follow.
page.replay_title: New, or just want a refresher?
page.replay_body: Walk through the gentle welcome again, anytime.
page.disclaimer: Life Compass is a self-reflection tool - not a substitute for professional help or therapy. If things feel heavy, please reach out to someone who can support you. Based on material from KBT i primärvården.

onboarding.footer: Stop anytime - Everything stays on your device

welcome.title: A quiet place to notice what matters.
welcome.body: A few short cards, then you're in. Nothing to set up - skip ahead whenever you like.

ready.title: Whenever you're ready.
ready.body: You can reopen this guide anytime from Help.

what.title: A value is a direction, not a goal
what.lede: Life Compass is a quiet place to notice what matters to you - and how close your days feel to it.
what.pull: You don't have to fix anything - just name what matters, and notice.
body: You name the areas of life that matter - people, work, health, play, whatever is yours - in your own words.
A value isn't a target you hit and finish. It's a direction you keep facing. So there's nothing to complete here, and no way to fall behind.

weekly.title: Once a week, one gentle question
weekly.lede: When you like, it asks how close the week felt to what matters - answered in plain words, never scores.
weekly.pull: How close did the week feel to what matters?
body: There are no ratings to give and no numbers to chase. You answer in words - from "far from it" to "fully" - and you can leave a short note if you want to, or not.
Every step is optional. Answer one area, or all of them, or none. You can stop at any point and what you've written stays.

pressure.title: No streaks. Nothing to keep up
pressure.lede: Miss a week and it costs you nothing. There is no catching up to do.
pressure.pull: Miss a week, or a month. It costs you nothing.
body: This isn't a habit tracker. It never rewards a run of days or marks a gap as a failure - because life isn't a streak.
Reminders are off unless you ask for them, at most one a week, and easy to turn off again. Coming back after a long while is welcome, and quietly so: there's nothing to make up.

method.title: Built through burnout, gently
method.lede: It grew out of one person's recovery, using a values exercise from cognitive behavioural therapy.
method.pull: Made by someone who needed it - first for themselves.
body: Life Compass began as a tool its maker built to get through burnout, drawing on the "Livskompass" values exercise from KBT i primärvården (CBT in primary care).

That origin sets the tone: a companion, not a coach or a clinic. It's a self-reflection tool - not a substitute for professional help. If you're struggling, please reach out to someone who can support you.

data.title: Everything stays on your device
data.lede: Nothing is tracked or uploaded. Keep a copy, bring one in, or clear it all - whenever you want.
data.pull: It's yours. It stays here, on your device.
body: There is no account and no server. Everything you write lives in this browser, and nothing leaves it.
Your copy is always yours: export it to a file, import one back, or delete everything in one step.

error_reading_file: Could not read the file. Please try again.
importance_help: Specify how important this area is in your life on a scale of 1-10, where 1 means not important and 10 means very important. Consider how your life would be if everything looked exactly as you wished.

introduction.disclaimer_description: This app is intended as a self-reflective tool to help you explore what is important in your life. It is not meant to replace professional help, therapy, or contact with healthcare. If you are feeling unwell or need support, we encourage you to seek professional help.
introduction.examples_description: A value is not a goal, but a direction. Examples:
introduction.examples_family: Relationships: "I want to be a present and caring friend."
introduction.examples_health: Health: "I want to prioritize my health through regular exercise and recovery."
introduction.examples_work: Work: "I want to contribute to something meaningful and develop in my profession."
introduction.how_description: You reflect on various areas of your life, such as:
introduction.how_family: Family & relationships: How do you want to be as a partner, parent, or friend?
introduction.how_health: Health & Well-being: How do you take care of yourself physically and mentally?
introduction.how_leisure: Leisure & Personal development: What makes you happy and engaged?
introduction.how_work: Work & Career: What is most important for you in your work?
introduction.next_steps_description: By exploring your own Life Compass, you can start acting in line with your values and create a more meaningful life. Click "Start your journey" to begin!
introduction.privacy_description: We respect your privacy. We do not track any of your actions or what you write. All your data remains local and is not shared with any external party.
introduction.what_is_description: Life Compass is a tool to reflect on what is truly important in your life. Instead of being driven by short-term goals or external expectations, it helps you identify your core values - what you stand for and how you want to live your life.
introduction.why_description: Having clear values gives direction and motivation in life. Without them, we may feel lost or uncertain in our decisions. With a Life Compass, you can navigate challenges, make decisions, and live more in line with what is meaningful for you.

life_compass_subtitle: Discover your life balance. Create your life compass.
local_storage_not_available: Warning: Local Storage is not available. Your data will not be saved.
name: Name
name_help: Life area's name. The name must be unique.

privacyPolicy.closing: If you have any questions or concerns about your privacy, please contact us.
privacyPolicy.dataExport: You can export your data at any time using the export function in the app. If you wish to clear all your data, you can simply clear your browser's local storage.
privacyPolicy.dataStorage: All information you provide is stored locally in your browser's local storage. This means your data is only available on the device you use and is not transmitted over the internet.
privacyPolicy.intro: Your privacy is very important to us. We are committed to protecting your personal information. This application is designed to respect your privacy by processing all data locally in your browser.
privacyPolicy.noCookies: This application does not use cookies to track or store personal information.
privacyPolicy.noTracking: We do not track your actions or behaviors within the application. There are no tracking cookies or analytics tools embedded in this app.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.userControl: You have full control over your data. It is stored securely on your device, and you can export or remove it at any time by clearing your browser's local storage.

recommend_max_ten_life_areas: We recommend keeping the number of life areas around 10 for the best overview.
remove_all_life_areas_warning: Warning: This will remove all life areas and all data. Do you want to continue?
remove_life_area_warning: Warning: This will remove the life area and all its data. Do you want to continue?
reset_life_compass_warning: Are you sure you want to reset the life areas to default?
satisfaction_help: Specify how much you have lived in accordance with your values over the past week, where 1 means you haven't lived by your values at all and 10 means you have fully lived by your values.
unsaved_changes_warning: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to continue?
compass_subline: Map what matters and how your week measured up.
empty_state_body: Add your first life area, or begin with a predefined set of common areas.
radar_view_heading: Your life compass at a glance

heading.title: What matters to you, and how the week felt.

welcome.title: Let's build your compass.
welcome.body: This is the whole idea: you in the middle, and the handful of things that matter most around you. We'll add them one at a time. There's no right answer, and you can change anything later.
welcome.cta_suggest: Start from a few common areas
welcome.privacy: Everything stays on your device. Nothing is tracked or shared.

suggest.title: Which of these matter to you?
suggest.body: Just starting points - choose any that fit, skip the rest, and add your own later. Nothing here is fixed.

map.label: Map
map.sub: You, and the things that matter around you

map.helper_empty: Tap a + to name something that matters. Add as few or as many as you like.
map.helper_populated: Tap any area to open and reflect. A faded box means you've drifted a little from it.

today.question: How close did this past week feel?

week.affirm: You showed up and noticed how things are. That matters more than any number.

delta.new: Newly added - nothing to compare yet.
delta.closer: A little closer than last week.
delta.same: About the same as last week.
delta.further: A bit further - be gentle with yourself.

week.tender: This one matters to you - somewhere to be kind to yourself.

detail.prompt_placeholder: a few words for what this means to you
detail.prompt_aria: A few words for what this means
detail.value_help: In your own words. There's no right answer.
detail.value_placeholder: What does living well in this area look like for you?
detail.matters_label: How much does this matter to you?
detail.matters_help: Your compass needle - this rarely changes week to week.
detail.lived_label: How close did you live to it this past week?
detail.lived_help: Just this week. Be honest and kind - both at once.

reflection.far_off: This matters a lot to you, and lately it's felt far off. Not a failure - just a gentle signal of where your attention wants to go.
reflection.close: This matters to you, and you've been living close to it. Worth noticing what's helping.
reflection.aligned: What you value here and how you've lived it are close together right now.
reflection.small_distance: A small distance between what you value and how the week felt. Nothing to fix - just something to see.
